description: This file controls the item modifiers for each Set item in a Set. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: index
columns.description: Links to a string key for displaying the Set item name

columns.name: set
columns.description: Defines the Set to link to this Set Item

columns.name: disabled
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, this set item fully disabled and cannot be dropped randomly or explicitly from a treasure class.

columns.name: spawnable
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, this set item can be rolled as a choice when randomly dropping a set item. If equals 0, then this item cannot be dropped randomly, but can still be drop explicitly from a treasure class.

columns.name: disableChronicle
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, this set item will not appear in the chronicle.

columns.name: DropConditionCalc
columns.description: If the evaluated result of this condition is 0, hen prevent the set item from being rolled as a choice when randomly dropping a set item. Treasure Class scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: firstLadderSeason
columns.description: Integer field. The first ladder season the set item can be made on (inclusive). If blank or 0 then it is available in non-ladder.

columns.name: lastLadderSeason
columns.description: Integer field. The last ladder season the set item is ladder-only (inclusive). Must be used in conjunction with .firstLadderSeason.

columns.name: item
columns.description: Defines the baseline item code to use for this Set item

columns.name: rarity
columns.description: Modifies the chances that this Unique item will spawn compared to the other Set items. This value acts as a numerator and a denominator. Each .rarity value gets summed together to give a total denominator, used for the random roll for the item. For example, if there are 3 possible Set items, and their .rarity values are 3, 5, 7, then their chances to be chosen are 3/15, 5/15, and 7/15 respectively. (The minimum .rarity value equals 1)

columns.name: lvl
columns.description: The item level for the item, which controls what object or monster needs to be in order to drop this item

columns.name: lvl req
columns.description: The minimum character level required to equip the item

columns.name: chrtransform
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item when equipped on a character or dropped on the ground. If empty, then the item will have the default item color.

columns.name: invtransform
columns.description: Controls the color change of the item in the inventory UI. If empty, then the item will have the default item color.

columns.name: invfile
columns.description: An override for the armor.invfile, weapons.invfile, or misc.invfile field. By default, the Set Item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .item field.

columns.name: flippyfile
columns.description: An override for the armor.flippyfile, weapons.flippyfile, or misc.flippyfile field. By default, the Set Item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .item field.

columns.name: dropsound
columns.description: An override for the armor.dropsound, weapons.dropsound, or misc.dropsound field. By default, the Set Item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .item field.

columns.name: dropsfxframe
columns.description: An override for the armor.dropsfxframe, weapons.dropsfxframe, or misc.dropsfxframe field. By default, the Set Item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .item field.

columns.name: usesound
columns.description: An override for the armor.usesound, weapons.usesound, or misc.usesound field. By default, the Set Item will use what was defined by the baseline item from the .item field.

columns.name: cost mult
columns.description: Multiplicative modifier for the Set item's buy, sell, and repair costs

columns.name: cost add
columns.description: Flat integer modification to the Set item's buy, sell, and repair costs. This is added after the .cost mult has modified the costs.

columns.name: add func
columns.description: Controls how the additional Set item properties (.aprop#) will function on the Set item based on other related set items are equipped

columns.name: prop1
columns.description: Controls the item properties that are add baseline to the Set Item Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: par1
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field) A number or references skills.skill, montype.type, or states.state

columns.name: min1
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: max1
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.prop#). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: diablocloneweight
columns.description: The amount of weight added to the diablo clone progress when this item is sold. When offline, selling this item will instead immediately spawn diablo clone.
